notes: DNS Zone is PaaS; NSG does not apply to DNS Zone resource; NSGs apply to subnets that clients use to reach DNS | Exa 2026-06-18: Azure DNS Zone is a PaaS resource. Private DNS VNet links are product functionality not NS control; Public DNS has no VNet integration | Exa 2026-06-18: Private DNS Zones have Virtual Network Links (VNet registration/resolution links) but this is product functionality, not an NS-1 security control. Public DNS Zones have no VNet integration. VNet Links on Private DNS are checkable but not classified as NS network segmentation control. DNS Zone itself has no Private Link concept; used to resolve privatelink.* FQDNs but zone has no PE | Exa 2026-06-18: Azure DNS Zone itself has no Private Link concept. Public DNS by design; no public_network_access toggle; Private DNS is separate product | Exa 2026-06-18: Public DNS Zones are public by design — their purpose is global DNS resolution. DNS Zone stores DNS records only (A/AAAA/CNAME/MX/TXT etc.); no customer PII or business data | Exa 2026-06-18: Azure DNS Zone stores DNS records (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, SOA, NS, SRV, PTR, CAA) only. DNS records are operational metadata; no DLP product applicable; DNS exfiltration risk handled by Defender for DNS (LT-1) | Exa 2026-06-18: DNS records are operational infrastructure metadata. No DLP product applicable to DNS zone resource. DNS exfiltration risk (data in DNS queries) is a network-layer concern addressed by Defender for DNS (LT-1), not DLP. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/dns/dns-overview

DNS protocol (RFC 1035) is cleartext UDP/TCP 53 by design; Azure DNS does not support DoH or DoT; DP-3 Not Applicable | Exa 2026-06-18: DNS protocol (RFC 1035) transmits queries and responses in cleartext over UDP/TCP port 53. Azure DNS does not natively support DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) or DNS-over-TLS (DoT) for resolvers. ARM management API uses HTTPS but that is control-plane, not DNS data-plane. DP-3 Not Applicable to Azure DNS data plane. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/dns/dns-overview
